contentBlocks.original:
श्री आञ्जनेय सुप्रभातमु
अमल कनकवर्णं प्रज्वल त्पावकाक्षं
सरसिज निभवक्त्रं सर्वदा सुप्रसन्नम् ।
पटुतर घनगात्रं कुण्डलालङ्कृताङ्गं
रण जय करवालं रामदूतं नमामि ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī āñjanēya suprabhātamu
amala kanakavarṇaṃ prajvala tpāvakākṣaṃ
sarasija nibhavaktraṃ sarvadā suprasannam ।
paṭutara ghanagātraṃ kuṇḍalālaṅkṛtāṅgaṃ
raṇa jaya karavālaṃ rāmadūtaṃ namāmi ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Śrī Āñjanēya Suprabhātam: I bow to Rāmadūta (Rāma's messenger), Śrī Āñjanēya — of pure golden hue, with blazing fire-like eyes, a lotus-like face, always cheerful, a body of well-set might, adorned with earrings, bearing the sword of victory in battle.

contentBlocks.original:
अञ्जना सुप्रजा वीर पूर्वा सन्ध्या प्रवर्तते
उत्तिष्ठ हरिशार्दूल कर्तव्यं दैवमाह्निकम् ।
उत्तिष्टोत्तिष्ठ हनुमान् उत्तिष्ठ विजयध्वज
उत्तिष्ठ विरजाकान्त त्रैलोक्यं मङ्गलङ्कुरु ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
añjanā suprajā vīra pūrvā sandhyā pravartatē
uttiṣṭha hariśārdūla kartavyaṃ daivamāhnikam ।
uttiṣṭōttiṣṭha hanumān uttiṣṭha vijayadhvaja
uttiṣṭha virajākānta trailōkyaṃ maṅgaḻaṅkuru ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O noble and heroic son of Añjanā — the eastern twilight has set in! Arise, O tiger among Hari's devotees — the divine daily duty awaits. Arise, arise, O Hanumān! Arise, O banner of victory! Arise, O beloved of the spotless (Rāma), and bring auspiciousness to all three worlds!

contentBlocks.original:
श्री रामचन्द्र चरणाम्बुज मत्तभृङ्ग
श्री रामचन्द्र जपशील भवाब्धिपोत ।
श्री जानकी हृदयताप निवारमूर्ते
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī rāmachandra charaṇāmbuja mattabhṛṅga
śrī rāmachandra japaśīla bhavābdhipōta ।
śrī jānakī hṛdayatāpa nivāramūrtē
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O bee drunk at the lotus feet of Śrī Rāmacandra — O boat on the ocean of existence, devoted to Śrī Rāmacandra's recitation — O form that removes the very anguish of Jānakī's heart — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
श्री राम दिव्य चरितामृत स्वादुलोल
श्री राम किङ्कर गुणाकर दीनबन्धो ।
श्री रामभक्त जगदेक महोग्रशौर्यं
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī rāma divya charitāmṛta svādulōla
śrī rāma kiṅkara guṇākara dīnabandhō ।
śrī rāmabhakta jagadēka mahōgraśauryaṃ
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O one ever eager to relish the nectar of Śrī Rāma's divine deeds — O treasure of virtues, servant of Śrī Rāma, friend of the humble — O one of fierce and matchless valor devoted to Śrī Rāma — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
सुग्रीवमित्र कपिशेखर पुण्य मूर्ते
सुग्रीव राघव नमागम दिव्यकीर्ते ।
सुग्रीव मन्त्रिवर शूर कुलाग्रगण्य
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sugrīvamitra kapiśēkhara puṇya mūrtē
sugrīva rāghava namāgama divyakīrtē ।
sugrīva mantrivara śūra kulāgragaṇya
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O holy and auspicious form, friend of Sugrīva, foremost of monkeys — O one of divine fame celebrated by Sugrīva and Rāghava (Rāma) — O foremost hero, prime among the brave, best counselor of Sugrīva — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
भक्तार्ति भञ्जन दयाकर योगिवन्द्य
श्री केसरीप्रिय तनूज सुवर्णदेह ।
श्री भास्करात्मज मनोम्बुज चञ्चरीक
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhaktārti bhañjana dayākara yōgivandya
śrī kēsarīpriya tanūja suvarṇadēha ।
śrī bhāskarātmaja manōmbuja chañcharīka
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O remover of devotees' afflictions, O compassionate one, worshipped by the yogis — O dear son of Kēsarī, O one of golden body — O bee hovering at the lotus of the Sun's (Bhāskara's) very soul — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
श्री मारुतप्रिय तनूज महबलाढ्य
मैनाक वन्दित पदाम्बुज दण्डितारिन् ।
श्री उष्ट्र वाहन सुलक्षण लक्षिताङ्ग
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī mārutapriya tanūja mahabalāḍhya
maināka vandita padāmbuja daṇḍitārin ।
śrī uṣṭra vāhana sulakṣaṇa lakṣitāṅga
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O dear son of Mārutas (the Wind), endowed with immense might — O one whose lotus feet were worshipped by Maināka in the ocean, O punisher of enemies — O one whose body bears all auspicious marks — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
पञ्चाननस्य भवभीति हरस्यराम
पादाब्द सेवन परस्य परात्परस्य ।
श्री अञ्जनाप्रिय सुतस्य सुविग्रहस्य
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pañchānanasya bhavabhīti harasyarāma
pādābda sēvana parasya parātparasya ।
śrī añjanāpriya sutasya suvigrahasya
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O Five-faced one (Pañcānana) who removes the fear of worldly existence — devoted to the service of Rāma's lotus feet, beyond the beyond — O dear son of Añjanā, of beautiful form — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
गन्धर्व यक्ष भुजगाधिप किन्नराश्च
आदित्य विश्ववसु रुद्र सुरर्षिसङ्घाः ।
सङ्कीर्तयन्ति तवदिव्य सुनामपङ्क्तिं
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gandharva yakṣa bhujagādhipa kinnarāścha
āditya viśvavasu rudra surarṣisaṅghāḥ ।
saṅkīrtayanti tavadivya sunāmapaṅktiṃ
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: Gandharvas, yakṣas, the lord of serpents, kinnaras — the Ādityas, Viśvavasu, Rudra, the hosts of gods and sages — all chant the row of your divine and beautiful names — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
श्री गौतम च्यवन तुम्बुर नारदात्रि
मैत्रेय व्यास जनकादि महर्षिसङ्घाः ।
गायन्ति हर्षभरिता स्तव दिव्यकीर्तिं
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī gautama chyavana tumbura nāradātri
maitrēya vyāsa janakādi maharṣisaṅghāḥ ।
gāyanti harṣabharitā stava divyakīrtiṃ
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: Gautama, Cyavana, Tumburu, Nārada, Atri, Maitreya, Vyāsa, Janaka and other hosts of great sages — sing your divine glories with hearts filled with joy — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
भृङ्गावली च मकरन्द रसं पिबेद्वै
कूजन्त्युतार्ध मधुरं चरणायुधाच्च ।
देवालये घन गभीर सुशङ्ख घोषाः
निर्यान्ति वीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhṛṅgāvaḻī cha makaranda rasaṃ pibēdvai
kūjantyutārdha madhuraṃ charaṇāyudhāchcha ।
dēvālayē ghana gabhīra suśaṅkha ghōṣāḥ
niryānti vīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: Swarms of bees drink the honey-nectar, cooing sweetly — the rooster calls in the half-dark — in the temple, deep and resonant conch-blasts ring out — auspicious morning to you, O heroic Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
पम्पा सरोवर सुपुण्य पवित्र तीर्ध-
मादाय हेम कलशैश्च महर्षिसङ्घाः ।
तिष्टन्ति त्वक्चरण पङ्कज सेवनार्थं
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pampā sarōvara supuṇya pavitra tīrdha-
mādāya hēma kalaśaiścha maharṣisaṅghāḥ ।
tiṣṭanti tvakcharaṇa paṅkaja sēvanārthaṃ
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: Taking the holy and purifying water of the Pampā lake in golden vessels — the hosts of great sages stand waiting to serve at your lotus feet — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!

contentBlocks.original:
श्री सूर्यपुत्र प्रियनाथ मनोज्ञमूर्ते
वातात्मज कपिवीर सुपिङ्गलाक्ष
सञ्जीवराय रघुवीर सुभक्तवर्य
श्री वीर धीर हनुमान् तव सुप्रभातम् ॥
[श्री राम भक्त अभय हनुमान् तवसुप्रभातम् ॥]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrī sūryaputra priyanātha manōjñamūrtē
vātātmaja kapivīra supiṅgaḻākṣa
sañjīvarāya raghuvīra subhaktavarya
śrī vīra dhīra hanumān tava suprabhātam ॥
[śrī rāma bhakta abhaya hanumān tavasuprabhātam ॥]
contentBlocks.translation: O dear Lord of Śrī Sūrya's son (Sugrīva), of mind-captivating form — O son of the Wind, O heroic monkey, O one with tawny eyes — O giver of life (Sañjīvanī), best among the devotees of Raghuvīra — auspicious morning to you, O Śrī Vīra Dhīra Hanumān!
